meta.title: Crony Capitalism with Chinese Characteristics
meta.description: Hudson Institute’s Financial Corruption and Autocracy Initiative (FCAI) hosted a discussion moderated by FCAI Executive Director Charles Davidson on the sources and implications of China’s kleptocracy. Minxin Pei, Professor and Director, Keck Center for International and Strategic Studies, Claremont McKenna College, argues this kleptocracy originated two decades ago when elites in the Chinese party-state, private businesses, and organized crime colluded to loot state-owned assets. - Captured Liv
